_meta.name: Your Name
sources: Add where your preference data came from
_meta.notes: Copy this file to <your-name>.json and fill in your preferences. Delete any sections that don't apply. The more detail you provide, the better the agents can calibrate to your taste.

identity.travel_style: How you like to explore cities (e.g., 'structured sightseeing', 'flâneur-style wandering', 'activity-focused adventure')
identity.shopping_mode: How you shop (e.g., 'targeted buyer', 'casual browser', 'treasure hunter')
identity.aesthetic: What visual/atmospheric qualities you're drawn to
cultural_sensibility: Cultural interests and influences that shape your taste
values: What matters to you when choosing places

coffee.notes: Describe what you look for in a coffee shop — the vibe, the coffee style, the experience.
positive_signals: Qualities that make a coffee shop appealing to you
negative_signals: Qualities that make a coffee shop unappealing

reference_places.name: A coffee shop you love
reference_places.why: What makes it special to you

shopping.notes: Describe what you look for when shopping — types of stores, what you buy, how you browse.

reference_places.name: A shop you love
reference_places.why: What makes it special to you

food.dining_style: How you like to eat out — casual, fine dining, street food, etc.

reference_places.name: A restaurant you love
reference_places.why: What makes it special to you

books.notes: What you look for in bookstores.

interests: Types of attractions and experiences you enjoy
avoid: Types of attractions you'd rather skip

preferred_neighborhoods.description: What kind of neighborhoods you gravitate toward
preferred_neighborhoods.pattern: How to identify your kind of neighborhood in a new city

context_signals.description: Cross-category heuristics — qualities that make any venue more or less appealing regardless of category
strong_positive: Universal qualities you love in any venue
